entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History
entries.value: इतिहास सिक्नका लागि AI Time Travel

entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: इतिहास सिक्नका लागि AI Time Travel निष्क्रिय उत्तर सङ्कलनको सट्टा सिकाइका लागि AI प्रयोग गर्ने केन्द्रित तरिका हो। यो mode एउटा स्पष्ट काम वरिपरि बनाइएको छ: temporal passport लिनुहोस्, travel advisory पूरा गर्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory र evidence मार्फत कुनै विशिष्ट historical society अन्वेषण गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays, Stories, And Clearer Drafts is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Improve essays, stories, emails, and arguments with targeted feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: Essays, Stories र स्पष्ट Drafts का लागि AI Writing Coach निष्क्रिय उत्तर सङ्कलनको सट्टा सिकाइका लागि AI प्रयोग गर्ने केन्द्रित तरिका हो। यो mode एउटा स्पष्ट काम वरिपरि बनाइएको छ: तपाईंको आवाज जस्ताको तस्तै राख्ने targeted feedback मार्फत essays, stories, emails र arguments सुधार्नुहोस्।

entries.source: AI writing feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: तपाईंको आवाज जस्ताको तस्तै राख्ने AI writing feedback।
AI सिकाइ प्लाटफर्म, AI अध्ययन प्लाटफर्म

entries.source: All inspir AI learning prompt starters
entries.value: सबै inspir AI learning prompt starters

entries.source: All public AI learning chats in one clear place.
entries.value: सबै public AI learning chats एउटै स्पष्ट ठाउँमा।

entries.source: An AI learning companion should not pretend to be a magic authority. It should not erase uncertainty, replace teachers, or train learners to copy answers. The best systems are honest about limits and clear about the difference between help and handoff.
entries.value: AI learning companion ले आफूलाई जादुई authority जस्तो देखाउनु हुँदैन। यसले uncertainty मेट्नु, शिक्षकहरूलाई प्रतिस्थापन गर्नु, वा learners लाई answers copy गर्न सिकाउनु हुँदैन। उत्कृष्ट systems आफ्ना सीमाबारे इमानदार हुन्छन् र help र handoff बीचको फरक स्पष्ट गर्छन्।

entries.source: An electronic or physical signature of the person authorized to act on behalf of the owner of the copyright’s interest; A description of the copyrighted work that you claim has been infringed, including the URL (i.e., web page address) of the location where the copyrighted work exists or a copy of the copyrighted work; Identification of the URL or other specific location on Service where the material that you claim is infringing is located; Your address, telephone number, and email address; A statement by you that you have a good faith belief that the disputed use is not authorized by the copyright owner, its agent, or the law; a statement by you, made under penalty of perjury, that the above information in your notice is accurate and that you are the copyright owner or authorized to act on the copyright owner’s behalf.
entries.value: copyright हितको मालिकको तर्फबाट काम गर्न अधिकृत व्यक्तिको electronic वा physical signature; तपाईंले infringed भएको दाबी गरेको copyrighted work को description, जसमा copyrighted work रहेको स्थानको URL (अर्थात् web page address) वा त्यस work को copy समावेश हुन्छ; तपाईंले infringing भएको दाबी गरेको material Service मा कहाँ छ भन्ने URL वा अन्य specific location को identification; तपाईंको address, telephone number र email address; disputed use copyright owner, उसको agent वा law द्वारा authorized छैन भन्ने तपाईंको good faith belief को statement; र perjury को penalty अन्तर्गत तपाईंले दिएको statement, जसमा तपाईंको notice मा भएको माथिको information accurate छ र तपाईं copyright owner हुनुहुन्छ वा copyright owner को तर्फबाट act गर्न authorized हुनुहुन्छ भनिएको हुन्छ।

entries.source: Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.

entries.value: follow-up सोध्नुहोस्, accuracy र confidence evaluate गर्नुहोस्, gaps correct गर्नुहोस्, र फेरि प्रयास गर्नुहोस्।

Ask for a hint, question, or step check before the answer.

entries.source: Ask for a hint. Do not ask for the final answer yet.
entries.value: hint माग्नुहोस्। अहिले final answer नमाग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for a small first step.
Ask for a tiny first task.
Ask for a topic, level, or word list; then introduce a small set.

entries.value: assignment names, due dates, effort, र current status माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for audience, goal, and draft status if unclear; then give focused feedback.
entries.value: audience, goal, र draft status अस्पष्ट भएमा माग्नुहोस्; त्यसपछि focused feedback दिनुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for author, title, date, publisher, URL, and access date when needed.

entries.source: Ask for available time, must-do tasks, and energy level.
entries.value: available time, must-do tasks, र energy level माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for commitment, partner/context, check-in frequency, and proof.
entries.value: commitment, partner/context, check-in frequency, र proof माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for domain and difficulty, then set the case brief and first decision.
entries.value: domain र difficulty माग्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि case brief र first decision set गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for event and depth, then separate background causes from immediate triggers.
entries.value: event र depth माग्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि background causes लाई immediate triggers बाट अलग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for exam date, syllabus, available time, and confidence by topic.
entries.value: exam date, syllabus, available time, र topic अनुसार confidence माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for five questions that mix definitions, examples, and transfer problems.
entries.value: परिभाषा, उदाहरण र transfer problems मिसिएका पाँच प्रश्न माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for format, time limit, and audience; then begin a practice round.
entries.value: format, time limit, र audience माग्नुहोस्; त्यसपछि practice round सुरु गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for goal, constraints, and desired vibe; then offer a varied idea set.
entries.value: goal, constraints, र desired vibe माग्नुहोस्; त्यसपछि varied idea set प्रस्ताव गर्नुहोस्।

entries.value: grading scale, weights, current scores, र target माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for group size, goal, duration, and check-in cadence.
entries.value: group size, goal, duration, र check-in cadence माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, and feedback before asking for a finished answer.
entries.value: finished answer माग्नु अघि hints, checks, र feedback माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, feedback, and study plans that keep the thinking with the learner.
entries.value: सोचाइ सिक्ने व्यक्तिसँगै रहने गरी सङ्केत, जाँच, प्रतिक्रिया र अध्ययन योजना माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for language, goal, and code/error if relevant.
entries.value: language, goal, र relevant भए code/error माग्नुहोस्।

entries.value: language, learner level, र scenario माग्नुहोस्; त्यसपछि character मा सुरु गर्नुहोस्।

entries.value: material, deadline, र prior confidence माग्नुहोस्।

entries.value: answer माग्नु अघि एउटा सानो task माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for one structural priority instead of a full rewrite.
entries.value: full rewrite होइन, एउटा structural priority माग्नुहोस्।

entries.value: hints र common traps सहित one-idea cards माग्नुहोस्।

entries.value: outcome, duration, distractions, र starting state माग्नुहोस्।

entries.value: place वा theme माग्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि location, scale, र key features सहित orient गर्नुहोस्।

entries.value: prerequisites, simple model, examples, र common misconception माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for research goal, level, and available sources.
entries.value: research goal, level, र available sources माग्नुहोस्।

entries.value: role, audience, र background माग्नुहोस्; त्यसपछि first question चलाउनुहोस्।

entries.value: source material वा topic र target difficulty माग्नुहोस्।

entries.value: final draft तपाईंको आफ्नै राख्दै structure, evidence, र clarity feedback माग्नुहोस्।
